user-prompt-submit.description: Run before processing user input to check for commit requests
args: const input = process.argv[1]; if (input.match(/commit|git commit/i)) { console.log('⚠️ Detected commit request - invoking Pre-Commit Guardian...'); process.exit(1); }

before-tool.description: Run quality checks before Bash tool executes git commands
args: ⚠️ Git commit detected - make sure Pre-Commit Guardian has reviewed changes first!
